instruction: In the clock app, can you set a timer for half an hour? I need to wrap something up by then.
Start a 3 hour timer using the clock app.
I am traveling to Kyoto, Japan tomorrow. Can you add a clock for that timezone to my list of world clocks in the Clock app?
Please add Munich, Germany to my list of world clocks in the Clock app.
answer_text: Munich, Germany has been successfully added to your world clocks list in the Clock app. The city now appears with a blue pin marker on the world map and displays the current time (12:29 PM, +6 hours from local time).
